text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho puts on a brilliant performance at
the Takarazuka Kinen and takes first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've made it through the crucial first
two years of her career... and a little bit more too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Shush, Familiar! Don't just randomly shout like
that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! You made me forget the new spell I was
about to come up with!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And the time on that clock is wrong! It's your job
as my familiar to fix things like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rapidly adjust the clock, apologizing profusely
to Sweep Tosho all the while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't simply slink away like some useless
familiar. As her trainer, there's something I need
to ask her about.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do about your next race?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What next race?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't care about racing anymore. I've already
used the most powerful racing magic out there.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Be quiet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A-hem! Racing magic isn't the only magic I want to learn, you know!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Studying magic is a lot of work! Don't you think
you should try being a little more considerate of
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle! WHAM!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pardon meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess, a spunky Umamusume who
fights strength with strength, comes barging in.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please teach me your racing magic!
Pleeeease!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...! You said "Huh"...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As in, "Huhve course!" Right?! Thank you so much!
I owe you big time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pffft! As if, Kawadummy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't even have any plans to race right now! So
my racing magic is currently closed for business.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Shaddup, shaddup, shaddup!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: B-but... I require your magic! I mean, it's... It's...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's the only thing that will change her mind!
...Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what're you crying for?! Ugh! Stop it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So why do you need my racing magic?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...I want someone to love racing.
choice_data_list: You want someone to love... racing?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's a certain person in your year that I look
up to, and I want her to fall in love with racing
again.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I had the chance to run with her once—but only
once. I ran as hard as I possibly could.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She's an excellent runner, so I wanted to win no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The second the race started, I ran for the front in
an attempt to push ahead. I kept trying to push
out past her...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But then... I felt an impact.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...And I heard a quiet yelp. When I turned around,
her face was completely pale.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: She stopped right there and left the track.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after that, I heard people saying that
she'd become afraid of running.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I went and apologized to her as fast as I could.
But she told me it wasn't my fault and that I didn't
have anything to apologize for.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But no matter how you look at it, it really was my fault!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I heard you were taking a break after you got hurt
in the Shuka Sho, but I see you're feeling good
enough to go out on partner runs already.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
S-Sweep?! Uh... um, it's nice to see you again, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, is it true you're scared of running now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've heard loads of rumors, but are they really
true?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: It's true.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But not every single detail. Kawakami really
didn't do anything wrong.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
All she did was compete the way anyone would.
She didn't even bump me that hard, and it didn't
even hurt.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...It was my fault I stopped that day on the track.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: How so?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: I just figured I couldn't do it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
When I was out with my injury, I started thinking
that, even if I recovered, I still wouldn't be able
to...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...The heck?
Do what?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I actually flinched during my race with
Kawakami, I had proof. I was just no match for
her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: And after that...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I saw you run in the Takarazuka Kinen. You were
so amazing. I understood why everyone called
your running magical.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could never be as good as you, so I
figured it was time to call it quits.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That's it? You watched me race, and that's what you thought?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen up—instead of saying you can't do it
anymore, just give it another shot!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Run like you did in the Japanese Oaks and the
Shuka Sh—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: I can't!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...I'm just so scared. I don't want to lose
horrifically and have to face the fact that I'm
really done for.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the same as I used to be. Anyone who gets
injured and takes a year off gets left behind...
That's just the way things are.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Just the way things are?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
How can you even say something so lame?! I don't
get it! I don't get it at all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Who cares if that's how things are?! Giving up
over something like that is so unbelievably LAME!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I can't help the way things are—it's just life! I'm
not like you! I can't just make miracles happen.
I'm just an ordinary—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Enough with that crap! Don't whine about what's
normal or the way things are. Just smash it all up
with magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come watch me race in the fall! I'll cast a spell
that'll bring back the old you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's a pinky promise... From me to you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar! What G1 race can I run in next?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think about which G1 races would be good for
her, seeing as she's incredibly motivated right
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One comes to mind. It's a prestigious race in the
fall that gathers the best of the best. What's
more, it should be a good fit for both her
distance aptitude and late surging skills.
choice_data_list: How about the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, that'll work! Now, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna use some really powerful magic at the autumn Tenno Sho, so make sure you drag you-know-who along to see it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I-I will!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(My amazing racing magic is going to smash this
lame world to pieces and drive everyone crazy.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(No one is allowed to give up after seeing my
magic! I'm just gonna have to use an even bigger,
better spell this time!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep?! Good. I wanted to talk to you too...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally convinced that you'd make the perfect
rival! Run in the autumn Tenno Sho with me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...! The autumn Tenno Sho? You're planning to run
there?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...! Hehe. Actually, I came here to ask you to race
against me again.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to race against you. And this time... I'm
going to win.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, you're gonna make the best rival ever!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The world's gonna see the genius Magical Girl
Sweepy use her best-ever ultimate magic at this
year's autumn Tenno Sho!
